creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
I am sorry but I can test the ports report only at my old pentium2 PC.
It will take a half of week to get a result of i386 system setting
though I did start the inspection in a jailed virtual FreeBSD 10.1-
RELEASE machine last evening.  If I must take more examination in
other platforms, tell me please.
